response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a single brief C++ role from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community-driven technical projects
Proven ability to mentor and teach software practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops)
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), SDL, or IEC 62443 standards
No demonstrable experience with cloud-native industrial platforms or on-premises high-performance C++ systems
